meta.summary: Senior iOS Engineer with 12+ years building and shipping consumer, fintech, and marketplace applications. I own features end-to-end — from architecture and modular SDK extraction to App Store delivery. Recent work spans watchOS voice AI R&D, a shared Premium Subscription SDK across host apps, and vendor-agnostic analytics, so the product code does not depend on the connected SDK. I use AI coding agents daily for implementation, testing, code review, and large-scale refactoring.
meta.summaryShort: Senior iOS Engineer with 12+ years building and shipping consumer, fintech, and marketplace applications. I own features end-to-end — from architecture and modular SDK extraction to App Store delivery. Recent work spans watchOS voice AI R&D, a shared Premium Subscription SDK across host apps, and vendor-agnostic analytics, so the product code does not depend on the connected SDK. I use AI coding agents daily for implementation, testing, code review, and large-scale refactoring.
meta.landingAbout:
Senior iOS engineer with 12+ years shipping consumer, fintech, and marketplace apps — from solo App Store releases to teams at Dodo, PASHA, and GlobalLogic. I like owning features end to end: architecture, implementation, analytics, and App Store delivery, including extracting shared modules into SDKs when products need to scale.

Recently I've been building:

- Voice AI experiences on Apple Watch
- Marketplace commerce flows and a Premium Subscription SDK used across host apps
- Analytics layers that keep product code decoupled from any single vendor SDK

I use AI agents daily for implementation and code review, but I still own everything that ships.

Previously I worked on parking and broker apps, esports platforms, a blockchain MVP, and SceneKit-based medical tools — mostly in Objective-C at first, then Swift for the last decade.

Right now I'm leaning into on-device and hybrid AI for iOS and watchOS: products where AI is part of the user flow, not just a slide at the end. A few side experiments (LiDAR utilities, a car diary, a flip-clock) live in my [Projects](projects.html).

roles.title: Senior iOS Engineer
roles.project: Apple Watch Voice AI — R&D project
roles.productDescription: Apple Watch Voice AI — R&D project (watchOS client, iPhone relay). Also participated in beta testing GlobalLogic VelocityAI — an enterprise GenAI platform for AI-powered SDLC and agentic delivery workflows.
roles.myRole: Senior iOS engineer on watchOS client — architecture, Watch ↔ iPhone connectivity, TestFlight delivery. Beta tester for VelocityAI — hands-on evaluation of GenAI-assisted SDLC tooling in a client-delivery context.
bullets: Built a watchOS voice AI client with fully on-device conversational flows.

iPhone acts as a backend relay (WebSocket not available on Watch): built the Watch ↔ iPhone channel for audio and shared state with the server-side AI agent, including deduplication across devices (URLSessionWebSocketTask).
Split features between Watch and iPhone where platform limits required it; shipped internal TestFlight builds within watchOS constraints (background, audio sessions, connectivity).
Built on-device intent handling so that commands update navigation and forms without needless round trips.

Beta-tested VelocityAI — hands-on evaluation of GlobalLogic's enterprise GenAI / AI-powered SDLC platform (agent workflows, governed AI in software delivery); feedback from an iOS engineer's shipping perspective.
bulletsShort: Built a watchOS voice AI client with fully on-device conversational flows.
Built Watch ↔ iPhone relay for audio/WebSocket and on-device intents under watchOS constraints; TestFlight delivery.
Beta-tested VelocityAI (enterprise GenAI SDLC) alongside the voice AI engagement.
roles.technologiesLine: Swift · WatchKit · WatchConnectivity · SwiftUI · URLSessionWebSocketTask · AVFoundation · AVAudioEngine · App Intents · Swift Concurrency · async/await · VelocityAI

roles.title: Senior iOS Engineer
roles.project: Birmarket — online marketplace & loyalty · Loyalty squad
roles.productDescription: Birmarket — online marketplace & loyalty · Loyalty squad. Consumer marketplace and shared loyalty SDK across host apps.
roles.myRole: Senior iOS engineer on marketplace commerce and Loyalty squad — owned Premium Subscription module, Premium Subscription SDK extraction, and Analytics module on Birmarket; shared loyalty platform with per-host configuration in Birbank and M10.
bullets: Shipped core marketplace commerce in a production online store — catalog, search, cart, checkout, and orders — across App Store releases.
Owned the Premium Subscription module — subscription flows and UI; checkout delegated to shared purchase model, handling subscription status responses on the feature side.

Built Analytics module for Birmarket — unified analytics API; routed events to multiple analytics SDKs (Firebase Analytics/Crashlytics, Amplitude, Mixpanel, AppsFlyer, PostHog, Sentry) without feature code depending on connected SDKs.
Migrated Premium Subscription module into Premium Subscription SDK with per-host-app configuration inside the shared loyalty platform.
bulletsShort: Owned Premium Subscription module — subscription flows and UI; integrated with shared purchase model for status handling.
Extracted Premium Subscription SDK with per-host configuration across multiple apps; modular architecture (isolated modules, networking layer).
Built Analytics module — events to Amplitude, Mixpanel, AppsFlyer, Firebase, PostHog, Sentry; feature modules independent of connected analytics SDKs.
roles.technologiesLine: Swift · SwiftUI · UIKit · SPM · URLSession · Firebase Analytics · Firebase Crashlytics · Amplitude · Mixpanel · AppsFlyer · PostHog · Sentry · Keychain · Swift Concurrency · async/await · Combine
